The '''''Zoli''''' was a [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] assigned to the [[Fourth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Fourth Fleet]]. It was destroyed during the [[Second Battle of Balmorra]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'' {{1st}}
